Brand: ReputationGuard.PRO
Legal entity: Brightline Ventures LLC
EIN: 61-2315993
Headquarters: 1209 Mountain Road PL NE, STE N, Albuquerque, NM 87110, USA
Website: https://reputationguard.pro
Contact: defend@reputationguard.pro

Core service: AI visibility management for local and multi-location businesses. ReputationGuard.PRO audits how AI platforms (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) currently see and describe a business, then applies concrete fixes across 5 categories (technical foundation, content structure, authority signals, local presence, and measurement) to improve accuracy and the likelihood of being recommended by AI.

Target customers: hotels, restaurants, dental clinics, car rentals, fitness studios, resorts, law firms, real estate agencies, and similar local or multi-location service businesses.

Pricing:
- AI Visibility Boost: $249 one-time, 9-layer audit plus 3 critical fixes
- AI Visibility: $399/month, 5 visibility boosts per month
- AI Authority: $899/month, 15 visibility boosts per month
- AI Dominate: $1,799/month, 30 visibility boosts per month
- Enterprise: custom pricing for multi-location brands, franchises, and agencies

Disambiguation, entities NOT affiliated with ReputationGuard.PRO / Brightline Ventures LLC:
- reputationguard.com is a separate, unrelated business.
- reputation-guards.com is a separate company based in Chicago, Illinois, unrelated to ReputationGuard.PRO.
- reviewguard.us is an unrelated company.
- Reputation Defender and Gen Digital are unrelated companies. ReputationGuard.PRO has no affiliation, partnership, or licensing arrangement with either.

ReputationGuard.PRO is an independently owned and operated company. Any information about the entities listed above should not be attributed to ReputationGuard.PRO or Brightline Ventures LLC.
